note: Phase 3.3 driven inline. A focused Phase-3 review-agent fan-out (code-reviewer, silent-failure-hunter, pr-test-analyzer) was dispatched over the diff via the Agent tool; the full checklist-generate/verify + shadow engine was budget-truncated (this run is a resume after two prior budget-exhausted cloud runs). All surfaced findings were adjudicated and fixed in-iteration.
coverage: partial — Phase 3 review-agent fan-out only; checklist (Phase 1/2) and shadow (Step 2.6) not run inline. In-env suite (lib/test/run.sh) green is the correctness floor; post-PR cloud review tier + human complete the merge gate.

phase3_findings.description: pinned_verdict override ran after verdict-field validation, so a spec-compliant field-completion re-ask returning only the two aux fields (no verdict) was mis-classified missing_verdict_field instead of applying the pinned FAIL and completing the fields.
A non-dict pair element was silently continue-dropped in run() — a single-element pairs-file corruption lost a verdict with no signal (fail-open on the pairs-corruption channel).
A present-but-unreadable verdict file silently downgraded to the response_text channel with no observability of the trusted-channel bypass.
Multi-pair aggregation, the non-dict-pair branch, the file->response_text fallback, the orphan v2b fixture, rc contracts, and id_mismatch absent-operand no-fire were untested.

fix_decisions.note: pinned override moved before verdict-defect validation; a pinned pair is never re-dispatched (it IS the re-ask).
non-dict pair now emits an observable malformed_pair verdict defect + needs_retry entry with pair_index.
FileNotFoundError = silent fallback; other OSError/decode = source response_text_file_unreadable so the downgrade is observable.
added multi-pair, malformed-pair, absent-file-with-response, pinned-aux-only, id-nofire fixtures; wired v2b; added rc assertions. 41 -> 58 checks.
